Software engineering since 2010 · Kathmandu & Melbourne

Dependable software, engineered around your business.

Roshan Subedi Founder & MD · Kathmandu
Santosh Bhattarai Director of Partnerships · Melbourne

E Multitech Solution helps organisations modernise their operations, launch digital products and build platforms that scale with their growth. Established in Kathmandu in October 2010, we combine engineering discipline with product thinking — and an AI-native approach that applies artificial intelligence only where it genuinely earns its place. The leadership you meet at the start is the leadership that stays.

  • 2010Established in Kathmandu · building software continuously ever since

WHAT WE DO

Software that moves your business forward.

Organisations come to us to modernise how they operate, bring new digital products to market, and build platforms that scale with their growth. The form that takes varies — custom software, SaaS platforms, web and mobile applications, digital marketplaces, AI-enabled workflows and specialist auction systems — but the intent is constant: software that improves how the business actually runs, and keeps improving it for years. Explore our case studies for the detail behind each capability.

HOW WE WORK

Three ways to engage us.

Every engagement runs under our technical leadership — what changes is how much of the delivery you want us to own.

Managed Product Delivery

You bring the goal; we own the outcome. Architecture, engineering, quality assurance and deployment, delivered end-to-end against milestones you can hold us to.
Best for: new products, regulated systems and full rebuilds.

Dedicated Development Teams

A stable, named team that works as an extension of yours — the same engineers month after month, managed by our department heads and aligned to your roadmap.
Best for: long-running products and scaling organisations.

Developers On Demand

Senior engineers matched to your stack and domain, embedded in your team when you need extra capacity — vetted by our technical leadership, never pulled from a marketplace.
Best for: capacity peaks and specialist skills.

LEADERSHIP

The team is the founder, the partner, the engineers, the work.

Named leadership you can reach directly — and who stay involved from the first conversation through years of production.

Verified on LinkedIn

Founder · Managing Director · Technology Lead

Roshan Subedi

Kathmandu, Nepal · UTC+5:45

“Built to last. Since day one.”

Roshan Subedi founded E Multitech Solution in Kathmandu in October 2010 and has led the company ever since. As Managing Director, he is responsible for its long-term direction: guiding product and technology decisions, setting the engineering and quality standards the team works to, and keeping delivery aligned with what each client is actually trying to achieve. He believes lasting systems come from disciplined execution and careful technology choices rather than trends, and he is guiding the company’s evolution toward AI-native product engineering with the same patience. Roshan measures success in two ways: software that is still creating value years after launch, and client relationships that last as long as the systems do.

Connect on LinkedIn WhatsApp +977 9851038796
Verified on LinkedIn

Director of Partnerships · Australia & APAC

Santosh Bhattarai

Melbourne, Australia · UTC+10/+11

“Locally Accessible, Globally Capable”

Based in Melbourne, Santosh Bhattarai leads E Multitech Solution’s partnerships across Australia and the Asia-Pacific region. He is the first point of contact for organisations in the region — working in their timezone, understanding their goals first-hand, and setting expectations honestly from the outset. Santosh focuses on the long-term relationships behind successful engagements, staying involved well beyond first delivery and connecting clients directly with the engineering leadership in Kathmandu.

Connect on LinkedIn WhatsApp +61 406 806 984

Delivery is overseen by department heads across engineering, cloud, AI and product experience — supported by multidisciplinary specialists spanning strategy, design, engineering and quality assurance.

ENGINEERING LEADERSHIP

Department heads who own the technical direction.

Selected engineering leadership — the people accountable for standards, architecture and quality on every engagement.

Sujit Sah

Head of Software Engineering

Owns architecture and code quality across every engagement — systems built to survive audits and scale.

Kaushal Sah

Head of Cloud & DevOps

Runs cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, and uptime engineering across all production platforms.

Indra Kumar Yadav

Head of AI & Intelligent Systems

Leads applied AI and intelligent-systems work, from LLM integrations to automation pipelines.

Manoj Kumar Sah

Head of Frontend & Product Experience

Guides frontend engineering and product experience so shipped software feels as good as it runs.

HOW WE THINK

Understand the business first. Then write the code.

Good software starts with understanding what a business is trying to achieve — so that is where every engagement begins. We favour practical architecture over unnecessary complexity, and maintainability over shortcuts: decisions are made for the system’s fifth year, not its first demo. We choose technology responsibly, improve continuously, and treat launch as the beginning of a system’s useful life rather than the end of ours. It is a slower way to start and a faster way to arrive — and it is why our systems stay in production.

FLEXIBLE ENGINEERING MODEL

Leadership stays constant. Capacity flexes.

Our permanent leadership assembles the team each project actually needs — matched by domain, stack and compliance experience — and stays accountable for the result.

  1. 01

    Discover

    A 30-minute engineering conversation, not a sales presentation. We map your goals, constraints and compliance needs — and tell you honestly if we’re not the right fit.

  2. 02

    Plan

    Architecture first: a technical plan with scope, milestones and the team shape the project needs, before commitments.

  3. 03

    Assemble

    Department heads select specialists by domain fit. The people you meet are the people who build.

  4. 04

    Deliver

    Transparent milestones, direct communication with the builders, and support that continues long after go-live.

AI-NATIVE DIRECTION

AI as part of the engineering, not an add-on.

We are building E Multitech Solution into an AI-native engineering company. That does not mean attaching AI to every proposal — it means artificial intelligence is considered throughout how we work — from product discovery and requirements through architecture, delivery and quality assurance, to the operational intelligence of the products themselves. Where AI creates meaningful value — automation, intelligent search, decision support, personalisation — we design it in, with human oversight and maintainability as conditions of use. Where it doesn’t, we say so. Explore our AI solutions →

SPECIALIST PRACTICE

We understand auction businesses, not just auction software.

Over many years of designing and evolving auction, bidding and marketplace ecosystems, E Multitech Solution has developed specialist knowledge of what makes digital transactions work: the commercial rules behind each format, the behaviour of bidders and sellers under time pressure, pricing mechanics, payment journeys, procurement workflows and the administrative controls that keep marketplaces trustworthy at scale. That understanding of the transaction lifecycle end to end — not merely its implementation — is why organisations trust us with complex commerce platforms — and it is independently reflected in our auction product’s verified client reviews on Capterra. If your project involves bidding, procurement or marketplace dynamics, see our auction and bidding practice →

SINCE 2010

Built in Kathmandu. Proven in production.

E Multitech Solution was established in Kathmandu in October 2010 and has been building software continuously ever since — more than 70 production platforms, by our own count, used by organisations around the world. What began in web and auction development has grown into a broader engineering practice spanning SaaS, mobile, regulated enterprise systems and AI-enabled products. The proof runs in production today: a central bank’s litigation system in its fifth year of service, a digital identity platform holding 99.4% uptime, and a maintenance marketplace architected to support more than 500,000 daily bookings. Read the case studies →

WHERE WE ARE

Two timezones. One team.

Kathmandu (HQ)

UTC+5:45 · Engineering headquarters

The in-house engineering practice — architecture, development and production operations — registered as E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. in Nepal since October 2010. Direct line: +977 9851038796 (WhatsApp).

Melbourne (Australia & APAC)

UTC+10/+11 · Director of Partnerships: Santosh Bhattarai

Regional representation for Australian and Asia-Pacific organisations: local-timezone conversations first, with engineering follow-through from Kathmandu. Direct line: +61 406 806 984 (WhatsApp + call).

Working worldwide

English-language delivery · Most regions covered

Collaboration across the US, UK, Europe, Australia and Asia — same-business-day responses for most regions, and direct access to the engineers doing the work.

IN THEIR WORDS

What it’s like to work with us.

Read more on our client stories page, or verify independently on Capterra.

"Excellent Work. Quality, awesome and fully knowledgeable Team. Always like to work with them. Communication is very good with E-Multitech Solution and they always understand what i need. I just need to give a word and they understand it quickly and bring all my concepts on real working software in front of me. I am very much impressed with there art of working."
Bob Brick
Miami, USA
🇺🇸
"Great experience working with these guys. Can highly recommend. Great software and a great team to work with. They were happy to work with my designs and to accommodate changes as and when. They are always available when needed to customize my site to my requirements and answer any technical questions."

United Kingdom
🇬🇧

QUESTIONS

About E Multitech Solution, frequently asked.

The questions prospective clients ask us most — answered straight.

Where is E Multitech Solution based?

The engineering team is in Kathmandu, Nepal — registered as E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. since October 2010 — with partnerships representation for Australia and APAC based in Melbourne.

What kind of work do you take on?

New digital products, modernisation of existing systems, SaaS platforms, mobile applications, and specialist marketplace and auction platforms — through managed delivery, dedicated teams, or developers on demand.

How does AI feature in your work?

We take an AI-native approach: artificial intelligence is considered across discovery, architecture, delivery and the product itself, and applied where it creates genuine value — with human oversight. We’ll tell you plainly when it isn’t the right tool.

Do you build auction and bidding platforms?

Yes — it’s a specialist practice built over many years, covering auction formats, procurement bidding and marketplace operations. Our auction product holds a 4.8★ Capterra rating. See the auction practice page for detail.

How do engagements start?

With a 30-minute engineering call — no slides, no obligation. We discuss your goals and constraints, and give you an honest view of fit, approach and team shape before any commitment. An NDA is available on request.

/ Founder-led since October 2010

A partner for what you’re building next.

Whether you need a new digital product, the modernisation of an existing system, an AI-enabled workflow, a specialist auction or marketplace platform — or simply a technology partner who will still be here in year five — the conversation starts the same way.
